<noinclude>
This is the data entry form for '''Property''' pages.
</noinclude><includeonly>
{{{info|page name=<Current Address[unique]>|create title=Create a Property Page|edit title=Edit Property Page}}}

{{{for template|Property}}}

{| class="formtable"
! Current Address:
| {{{field|Current Address|input type=text|mandatory|size=40|placeholder=e.g., 123 West G Street}}}
|-
! APN:
| {{{field|APN|input type=text|size=20|placeholder=e.g., 0089-112-050}}}
|-
! Block Number:
| {{{field|Block Number|input type=text|size=10}}}
|-
! Lot Number:
| {{{field|Lot Number|input type=text|size=10}}}
|-
! Year Built:
| {{{field|Year Built|input type=text|size=6|placeholder=e.g., 1875}}}
|-
! Year Built Approximate:
| {{{field|Year Built Approximate|input type=radiobutton|values=Yes,No|default=No}}}
|-
! Architectural Style:
| {{{field|Architectural Style|input type=combobox|values=Greek Revival,Italianate,Gothic Revival,Victorian,Queen Anne,Colonial Revival,Craftsman,Bungalow,Mission Revival,Spanish Colonial Revival,Art Deco,Moderne,Vernacular,Commercial,Industrial,Other}}}
|-
! Stories:
| {{{field|Stories|input type=text|size=4}}}
|-
! Construction Material:
| {{{field|Construction Material|input type=combobox|values=Wood Frame,Brick,Stone,Adobe,Concrete,Mixed}}}
|-
! Historic Status:
| {{{field|Historic Status|input type=dropdown|values=Landmark,Contributor,Non-Contributor,Not Surveyed|default=Not Surveyed}}}
|-
! Current Use:
| {{{field|Current Use|input type=combobox|values=Residential,Commercial,Mixed Use,Government,Religious,Vacant,Other}}}
|-
! Original Use:
| {{{field|Original Use|input type=combobox|values=Residential,Commercial,Mixed Use,Government,Religious,Hotel,Saloon,Warehouse,Other}}}
|-
! Builder:
| {{{field|Builder|input type=combobox|values from category=People}}}
|-
! Architect:
| {{{field|Architect|input type=combobox|values from category=People}}}
|-
! Latitude:
| {{{field|Latitude|input type=text|size=12}}}
|-
! Longitude:
| {{{field|Longitude|input type=text|size=12}}}
|-
! Survey Date:
| {{{field|Survey Date|input type=date}}}
|-
! Data Confidence:
| {{{field|Data Confidence|input type=dropdown|values=High,Medium,Low,Stub|default=Stub}}}
|}

{{{end template}}}

'''Free text:'''

{{{standard input|free text|rows=15}}}

{{{standard input|summary}}}

{{{standard input|minor edit}}} {{{standard input|watch}}}

{{{standard input|save}}} {{{standard input|preview}}} {{{standard input|changes}}} {{{standard input|cancel}}}
</includeonly>
